# ShieldQuestionMark

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ShieldQuestionMark;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ShieldQuestionMark { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
